questions.text: What is the successor of the largest 3-digit number?
questions.explanation: The largest 3-digit number is 999. Its successor is 999 + 1 = 1000, which is the smallest 4-digit number.

questions.text: The sum of two negative integers is always negative.
questions.explanation: When you add two negative integers, the result is always negative. For example: (-5) + (-3) = -8.

questions.text: What is the absolute value of -15?
questions.explanation: The absolute value of a number is its distance from zero on the number line, regardless of direction. |−15| = 15.

questions.text: The product of a positive integer and a negative integer is always ________.
questions.explanation: When multiplying integers with different signs (positive × negative), the result is always negative.
